title: Assistant Store Manager - Health & Glow - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Health & Glow - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Health & Glow in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Health & Glow:
Health & Glow is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Health & Glow!
